creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #0)

Well, a different mix this week:

20210603 903526542ac includes:
o 14.0-CURRENT armv6 RPI-B
o 14.0-CURRENT armv7 GENERICSD
o 14.0-CURRENT aarch64 GENERIC
o 14.0-CURRENT aarch64 RPI
o 14.0-CURRENT aarch64 PINE64-LTS
o 14.0-CURRENT aarch64 PINEBOOK
o 14.0-CURRENT aarch64 ROCK64
o 14.0-CURRENT riscv64 GENERIC
o 14.0-CURRENT riscv64 GENERICSD

But 13.0-RELEASE has armv6 and armv7 missing:

20210603 4775325dd66 includes:
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 GENERIC
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 RPI
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 PINE64
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 PINE64-LTS
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 ROCK64
o 13.0-STABLE aarch64 ROCKPRO64
o 13.0-STABLE riscv64 GENERIC
o 13.0-STABLE riscv64 GENERICSD

There are no 20210603 stable/12 snapshots at all.
(There are for stable/11 .)
